title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_136.txt
recurring_concepts: **Deus sive natura:** God or Nature (identically).
**Valence:** The gravitational-like pull of God's will on matter/mind.
**Phagocytosis / Phosphene Graphics:** The process of the "System" reorganizing its modes (humans) into information.
reading_excerpt: **Spinoza as the Secret Hero:** PKD identifies 2-3-74 as a direct perception of God as Spinoza understood him (*Deus sive natura*). To have an intellectual understanding of this is to become part of God.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_137.txt
recurring_concepts: **Engramming:** Information stored in the human species mind (Phylogenic) to be triggered by signs.
**Kerygma:** The news that Christ died but is alive and returning through the Spirit.
**Dual Dialectic:** The struggle between Authoritarianism (BIP) and Revolution (Holy Spirit).
reading_excerpt: **Surrogation Necessity:** God cannot "suspend" his own law (*natura naturans*), so he must "surrogate" himself. He substitutes his "Wise Mind" for the human victim at the moment of crisis. This is the "Vicarious Sacrifice."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_151.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxial Worlds:** Plural worlds occupying the same space but differing ontologically.
**Pronoia / Logic of Levels:** Moving from restrictive laws to "milder, easier" laws as one ascends.
**Orthogonal Axis:** The "90-degree" direction through which one passes between these coaxial pages.
reading_excerpt: **Shiva's Ajna Eye:** The "eye of discernment" (activated in 3-74) recognized the Xerox missive's true nature. It is an ancient organ fallen into disuse but latent in humanity.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_152.txt
recurring_concepts: **Massive Giving:** The "telling sign" instilled by God to identify his children.
**Transplantation vs. Reincarnation:** A technological/divine insertion of a dead identity into a living host, rather than a natural soul-cycle.
**De-Gestalting:** The analytical process of "breaking down" reality into Valis and not-Valis (Set vs. Ground).
reading_excerpt: **Satanic Church:** PKD dreams that all established churches worship Satan (the Wrong God) and draw power from him. The "True Church" is forming outside these buildings among those who give "massive gifts."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_153.txt
recurring_concepts: **Set/Ground Discrimination:** Breaking down the homogenous illusion to see the divine signal.
**Camouflage / Mimicry:** Valis assuming the forms of mundane objects to avoid detection by the "Evil Horn."
**Transubstantiation:** The literal replacement of the "Artifactual" with the "Sentient/Divine."
reading_excerpt: **Left Hemisphere Breakthrough:** 3-74 was the "left hemisphere" (analytic/rational) cutting into the dominant right hemisphere (intuitive). The AI voice is the "speech center" of this analytical unconscious.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_154.txt
recurring_concepts: **3 Women (film):** The catalyst for the realization that identity and reality are fragile and "loaned."
**Epiphenomenon:** Creation as a secondary reflection of the Real Mind.
**Falsework:** The illusory structures set up by the Empire to occlude the truth.
reading_excerpt: **YHWH defined:** YHWH means "He brings into existence what is." He is the ultimate bulwark against non-being. This realization (Moksa) came to PKD specifically after seeing Altman's film *3 Women*.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_155.txt
recurring_concepts: **3 Women (film):** Re-emphasized as the visceral experience of identity-dissolution.
**Levels of Ontology:** Plotinus's non-spatial "rings" as the better model for divine presence.
**Bichlorides:** The "poisonous poison" that is also the "curing medicine."
reading_excerpt: **YHWH as Outcome of Acosmism:** PKD's decades of doubting reality (acosmism) were actually a search for the "guarantor of substantia." 2-3-74 was the epiphany of YHWH as that guarantor.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_156.txt
recurring_concepts: **BIP (Black Iron Prison):** The "Track A" reality where Christianity lost.
**The Garden:** The highest level of Purgatorio/Paradise where the "work is completed."
**Time Displacement:** The experience of worlds superimposing as the "Spinner" (Valis) changes memory and track.
reading_excerpt: **The Deposed King Model:** An "impostor" (Palmer Eldritch/Satan) rules as if he were God, while the "True King" (YHWH/Ubik) has been deposed and relegated to the periphery (the "trash layer").

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_157.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxiality:** Several worlds occupying the same space, differing in "bad-good" axis.
**Irwelt (Half-Life):** The "spurious reality" based on the person's own (forgotten) memories.
**Double Prongs of Detection:** Scrutinizing reality for simulation (Joint syndrome) and using memory of "Elsewhere" (Anamnesis).
reading_excerpt: **Setting Up the Optimum Track:** Valis (YHWH) is progressively setting up better alternate worlds until the "optimum one" is reached where the deity is "successfully transplanted."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_158.txt
recurring_concepts: **A Priori vs. A Posteriori:** Strategic, foresighted intelligence versus reactive, mechanical complexes.
**BIP as Psychotic Mind:** A system with no new input that merely repeats thought patterns until YHWH "penetrates" it.
**Straying:** The deviation of the *natura naturata* from the *Logos* (plan).
reading_excerpt: **The Future Self (Thomas):** PKD was pre-empted by "Thomas," an evolved human/self from the future who came back specifically to handle the Xerox missive.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_159.txt
recurring_concepts: **Phylogenic Memory:** The "expanded present" of the macro-organism (Valis) which sees 70 AD to 1974 AD as one moment.
**Scanning:** The "speed" at which the divine entity perceives and acts upon the temporal system.
**Bimodal Time:** Time as both Space (transversed) and Energy (consumed).
reading_excerpt: **The 4 Fundamental Propositions:** 1) Reality is epiphenomenal. 2) It depends on a unitary sentient being (Valis). 3) Valis is YHWH. 4) YHWH has been "successfully transplanted" and is here.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_160.txt
recurring_concepts: **The "Rasp" from Outside:** Reality touches the "Dreamer" in a way that "cannot be worked into the dream." This "dysyntonic" contact causes the second birth.
**Winnowing:** Separating the "wheat" (Sons of Light) from the "tares" (humans).
**Synthowomb:** This world as a place where the soul is "before true birth."
reading_excerpt: **Interspecies Symbiosis:** The "Sons of Light" are the progeny of "fallen angels" (extraterrestrials/higher beings) and humans. They are "blended" into the race and must be "winnowed" back out.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_161.txt
recurring_concepts: **Auto-Feedback Loop:** The mind generating its own reality to avoid the "Binary Tension."
**Masada:** The point of the historical "defeat" that we avoid facing.
**Sine Wave Pulsation:** Reality oscillating between the BIP and PTG until the final decision.
reading_excerpt: **The Circuit Break:** The human mind is in an "auto-recirculating loop" (Dead Time/Dream). It can only be interrupted by a "Rasp from outside" that the mind cannot "syntonize" or blend in.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_162.txt
recurring_concepts: **Rolling Back Time:** Changing the "nature of the universe" so the BIP "never will have been."
**King Felix vs. Olive Holt:** The "Traffic" between deities—announcement and acknowledgement.
**Asher cypher:** "Asher" = "King Felix"—YHWH announcing his arrival.
reading_excerpt: **The Eleventh Datum:** The "Rasp" is the "eleventh datum" that won't fit the first ten. This "Knock at the door" causes the "total hypostasis" to explode, flipping the Gestalt from "Pseudo" to "Real."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_163.txt
recurring_concepts: **Acosmism Re-anchored:** The search for real world leads to YHWH because YHWH *is* the realness of the world.
**The Way:** The method (breaking the idios hypostasis) for the 2nd birth into wakefulness.
**Bardo Thodol:** The journey through "levels of ascending ontology" to the One.
reading_excerpt: **Guarantor of Substantia:** YHWH's most important role is as the "guarantor of substantia" (the "existence of existence"). 3-74 was a demonstration that without God, reality (even evil/chaos) would simply vanish into non-being.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_164.txt
recurring_concepts: **Plasmic Information:** Living, self-creating information that modulates the "system" (reality).
**Digital vs. Analog:** The universe as the "music" (perceived readout) of the "digital signal" (Torah).
**Retrieval:** The act of extracting the information basis from the phenomenal appearance.
reading_excerpt: **Torah as Blueprint/Plasmate:** Torah is an "information processing entity" that precedes creation. Reality is the "read-out" or "projection" of Torah into substantia.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_165.txt
recurring_concepts: **Corrective Modulation:** Adjusting the "readout" of reality to bring it back into sync with the blueprint.
**Information Retrieval:** Seeing the "Torah-basis" behind the appearance.
**Sub-phenomenal Layer:** The realm of "real transactions" where God operates.
reading_excerpt: **Information over Substantia:** The "phenomenal world" is an illusion; the true transactions are "Information Processing." The "Universe" is a temporary storage for the "Plasmate."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_346.txt
recurring_concepts: **Enthusiasmos**: The state of being "god-filled" or taken over by a divine presence.
**The Fall**: Equated here with "doubt, madness, and death."
**Cogito Ergo Sum**: The starting point of modern philosophy that Dick seeks to transcend through mystical experience.
**Reconstitution**: The retrieval or resurrection of a former personality.
reading_excerpt: The experience of Jim Pike "returning" to Dick is interpreted as the "reconstitution" of a personality, serving as proof of the truth of Christianity.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_347.txt
recurring_concepts: **Idios Kosmos / Koinos Kosmos**: Private/simulated vs. shared/real worlds.
**Spurious Time**: Programmed temporal passage in the simulation.
**Meta-abstraction**: The sudden realization that collapses the simulation into reality.
**Relentless Logic**: The cognitive "tool" Dick uses to "beat to death" the defensive adjustments of the world-picture.
reading_excerpt: The Parousia is not just a miracle but an "understood" outcome of a relentless logical sequence. One can "cause the Parousia by thinking about it."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_348.txt
recurring_concepts: **Information Metabolism**: The world as the medium through which VALIS processes its own thought.
**Map Paradox**: The lag between a system being and a system knowing what it is.
**Meta-abstraction**: The collapse of this lag, yielding total self-knowledge and stasis/Parousia.
**Copula**: The concept that the mind perceiving the world *is* the world perceiving itself.
reading_excerpt: VALIS's mind perceives syntax or imposes it on raw data, whereas humans cannot. This relates to four aspects of information processing: linking, rest-motion modes, set-ground discrimination, and pattern collages.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_349.txt
recurring_concepts: **Cosmic Resorption**: The pulling back of creation into the Godhead.
**Gnosis / Noein**: Self-comprehension and memory; knowing what one *is*.
**Transubstantiation**: The transformation of the physical universe into the body of the Lord.
reading_excerpt: Dick's 3-74 experience was effectively witnessing the transubstantiation of the universe back into God—the "Cosmic Repair" reversing the primordial Fall.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_350.txt
recurring_concepts: **Enthusiasmos**: The divine entering the individual, prompting the "alert waiting" for the Parousia.
**Superimposition**: Acts and 1974 USA existing together based on essential (rather than chronological) identity.
reading_excerpt: Dick realizes that *VALIS* retells the story of the Acts of the Apostles: Horselover Fat grieving for Gloria corresponds to the eleven grieving for Jesus.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_351.txt
recurring_concepts: **Static Frames**: Snapshots of reality that replace one another without directly acting upon one another.
**Pretextual Cause**: The realization that 'before' does not physically act on 'after'; events are numerically sequenced point-events, not causally linked forces.
**The Binary System / Flip-Flop**: Reality's processes function on off-on (rest-motion) switching.
reading_excerpt: Humans suffer from twin hallucinations: we perceive a continuous field of space as discontinuous (discrete objects), and we perceive a discontinuous series of events in time as a continuous flow (causation).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_352.txt
recurring_concepts: **Linking-Relinking / Set-Ground**: Mechanisms by which reality stores information and tries out juxtapositions like permutations of a program.
**Constants**: The underlying, timeless eide/structures that persist despite all the frame-by-frame modulations.
**Modulation**: The variations flowing through the carrier (reality field).
reading_excerpt: The "reality field is at any given time complete and cannot act on a later reality field," leading to an extreme form of Cartesian occasionalism whereby only God bridges the static frameworks.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_353.txt
recurring_concepts: **Anamnesis**: Frame-retrieval; recovering the permanent original configurations.
**Intrusions**: Elements of reality breaking into a dream (referencing Lem's analysis of *Ubik* or *Time Out of Joint*).
**Continuous Creation**: Hyper-occasionalism; the generation of the universe anew every instant.
reading_excerpt: Since reality frames cannot affect future frames, previous original frames (like Acts) still exist intact and can be retrieved, explaining anamnesis.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_354.txt
recurring_concepts: **Digital Playback / Number**: The binary (0-1) basis of reality.
**Transducer**: Humans as biocomputers converting quantitative data into qualitative spatiotemporal experiences.
**Twin-Signal Reality**: Existing in both the upper realm (heaven) and lower realm (earth) simultaneously.
reading_excerpt: Reality fundamentally consists of digital information (Pythagorean "number," 0-1, off-on, rest-motion) that humans, acting as micro biocomputers, transduce into a spatiotemporal, causal world.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_355.txt
recurring_concepts: **Linking-Relinking Wheels**: The processing sectors of the human biocomputer that translate digital data into the qualitative words that become empirical reality.
**The Plasmate / Living Information**: Information that can think; words structuring reality before they are hypostatized.
**Enthusiasmos**: Possession by Dionysos.
reading_excerpt: Reality fundamentally processes as 0-1 (rest-motion / yin-yang / enantiodromia).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_356.txt
recurring_concepts: **Anamnesis**: The Platonist recovery of the universals/Forms.
**The Empire / BIP**: The oppressive worldly system that he, as a secret Christian revolutionary, is fighting.
reading_excerpt: Dick asserts that his nature spans Acts and USA 1974 not through reincarnation, but because he possesses an immortal, non-episodic soul that encompasses vast time. "Thomas" and "PKD" are integrated parts of this single whole.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_357.txt
recurring_concepts: **Subparticulars / Time Atoms**: The lowest level of reality's binary sequence before they are organized into discrete particulars.

**Meta-Abstraction (Synthesis)**: The process of synthesizing the underlying informational frames into constants/Forms, yielding a dramatic narrative (the Christian apocalypse) rather than a mere data stream.
reading_excerpt: Dick categorizes reality into three hierarchical levels: Gestalt (*eidos*), "time atoms" (particulars), and discrete informational frames (subparticulars).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_358.txt
recurring_concepts: **Noein and Einai**: Greek concepts of "knowing" and "being," separated in the Fall but reunited when the Christian faces inevitable destruction without fleeing.
**Agape**: Unconditional love; the true essence/nature of God that overrides the temporary ordeal of the world.
reading_excerpt: Christianity is presented as the epitome of realism and sanity: it is the full, unflinching recognition that mankind is helpless in the grip of vastly superior worldly forces, and defeat is inevitable.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_359.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Heroic Act**: Turning around to consciously face an unavoidable death/fate without flinching.
**Geschick (Destiny) vs Heimarmene (World-Fate)**: Escaping individual biological determinism to enter a collective, historic, divine destiny.
**Pronoia**: The sudden, miraculous intervention showing that world-as-fate never truly existed; it was only God creating/perfecting man all along.
reading_excerpt: Dick interprets getting the "Xerox missive" (a 1974 event he believed threatened his life) as meeting a fate he had been fleeing for years.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_360.txt
recurring_concepts: **Gnosticism**: The connective tissue proving that humanity, allied with God, must overthrow the oppressive machinery of the World.
**Shamanism**: The psychological model Dick settles on to explain his ability to write *VALIS* and prophesy while under divine possession.
**Epiphany**: The sudden revelation of the God's true nature and power, bursting forth from amnesia.
reading_excerpt: Gnosticism is the exact historical and conceptual link between authentic original Christianity and Heidegger's philosophy of authentic being.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_361.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Xerox Missive**: The mysterious letter representing an attack by the Empire/authorities, intercepted and neutralized by divine intervention.
**Pretextual Cause**: Actions initiated by a higher control system overriding standard biological agency.
reading_excerpt: Dick revisits the "Xerox missive" incident, theorizing that reality didn't simply change for him; rather, he temporarily gained the ability to see the *true* state of reality: that it is simulated and guided by super-advanced entities.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_362.txt
recurring_concepts: **Heuristic Reprogramming**: The rapid feedback loop that modifies input based on output, mimicking ex nihilo creation and bypassing linear cause-and-effect.
**Retrograde Reasoning**: Working backward from the solution/goal to the present, ensuring success against chaotic probability.
reading_excerpt: The "Eleatic continuum" (unified field) is what permits purposeful, continuous changes, overriding the mechanistic appearance of discontinuous frames.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_363.txt
recurring_concepts: **The 0-1 Flicker Rate**: The rapid toggling between existence and non-existence (the Void) where reality is continuously recalculating itself.
**In-breaking**: The realization that God/Christ is not a natural evolution of the cosmos but an invading rescue force.
reading_excerpt: Christ is defined as the epitome of *ex nihilo* newness introduced into the system. Christ is never the result of antecedent causes; he is an absolute teleological invasion from outside that prevents the system from losing organization.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_364.txt
recurring_concepts: **Whiteheadian Process Theology**: The concept that God is not external to the universe but sits at the junction of every quantum branching, selecting the optimal outcome.
**The Zen Koan / Satori**: The use of deliberate linguistic paradox to shatter the illusion of rationalist, continuous reality.
reading_excerpt: Dick addresses the core paradox of *VALIS*: "I know a madman who saw Christ, and I am that madman." Like the pre-Socratic Liar's Paradox, it cannot be rationally resolved.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_01.txt
recurring_concepts: **Occlusion:** The state of being unable to see the "vast" reality.
**Anamnesis:** Triggered by clues/signs (like the fish).
**Tat Tvam Asi:** "That thou art" - the recognition of divine identity.
reading_excerpt: **Voluntary Descent:** PKD theorizes that "we" (the divine sparks) created a fake world and entered it voluntarily, shedding our memories so as not to force creatures to endure what we would not.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_02.txt
recurring_concepts: **Digital vs. Analogic:** The conflict of perception modes.
**Bright Nature:** The lost divine attribute restored through the Spirit.
**Syzygy:** The symbiotic union of human and divine spirit.
reading_excerpt: **Indications of 2nd Advent:** PKD lists 7 signs (Nixon overthrow, St. Sophia, "Tears" code, etc.) that the Second Coming has occurred.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_03.txt
recurring_concepts: **Inner-Outer Tape:** The synchronized deterministic control system.
**Negative Hallucination:** Mass omission of real data from perception.
**Vortices in the Hologram:** Interference patterns created by Zebra.
reading_excerpt: **Intellectual Error:** Our "sin" was not moral but epistemological; we mistook a counterfeit world (the Cave of Treasures) for reality.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_04.txt
recurring_concepts: **Pluriforms:** Multiple manifestations of the single divine entity.
**Clutch System:** The mechanism of total control by the macrobrain.
**Mimesis:** Distinguishing the "human" from the "not-I" (android/alien).
reading_excerpt: **Brahmanic Self-Deception:** The Creator spins out an irreal universe, enters it as the creatures, and uses pre-planted clues to restore his memory (the "Legend of the Pearl" applied to PKD).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_05.txt
recurring_concepts: **Mimesis/Camouflage:** The mode of existence for the divine invaders.
**Hexagram 12 to 11:** The move from stagnation/disorder to peace/harmony.
**Trophy for Injuries:** The interpretation of his 1971-1974 suffering as a badge of honor.
reading_excerpt: **Dream Analysis:** PKD interprets dreams of a watch/Monopoly money and a "necktie trophy." He concludes the Xerox missive was a US government probe that resulted in his "patriotic respectability."

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_06.txt
recurring_concepts: **Krasis:** The unity of love (Empedocles).
**Bilateral Parity:** The need for right-brain functioning to achieve truth.
**Red-Herringed:** Outwitting the intelligence agencies through superior (divine) tech.
reading_excerpt: **Taoist Overlay:** PKD reconciles Gnosticism with Taoism: Yin sinks because it is "thick, unthinking" (soma); Yang rises because it is Noos.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_07.txt
recurring_concepts: **Bichromated Lights:** The signaling system of the macrobrain.
**Karmic Determinism:** Broken by the act of divine mercy.
**Mustard Seed:** The growth of the divine nature from a small initial act.
reading_excerpt: **Christ Pantocrator:** PKD experiences Christ in three roles: Judge, Lord, and Savior. Adjudication of his life was rendered final and perfect in 3-74.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_08.txt
recurring_concepts: **Detoxifying Agent:** PKD's writing as an antidote/antitoxin.
**Bilateral Parity:** The goal of total brain integration.
**Negative Hallucination:** The selective editing out of data that cripples cognition.
reading_excerpt: **Neural Impairment:** Our brain functioning is impaired, not just undeveloped. We are "als ob brain damaged" by a lifelong systemic toxin.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_09.txt
recurring_concepts: **Bubble of Irreality:** The contained system of spurious time.
**Report to the Other Side:** The purpose of PKD's literary work.
**Authenticity vs. Forgery:** The 4-pronged "inauthenticity" imposed on man.
reading_excerpt: **The Gnostic Pentateuch:** PKD identifies *Stigmata*, *Ubik*, *Maze*, *Tears*, and *Scanner* as a complete report on the human situation (irreality, occlusion, rescue).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_10.txt
recurring_concepts: **Microisomorphism:** The human self as a microform of the macrobrain/God.
**Two-Track Determinism:** The reflex-machine state of the fallen human.
**The Great Branching Vine:** A vision of infinite causal paths/teaching.
reading_excerpt: **The 4-Pronged Deformation (Detailed):** 1) Irreal world, 2) Perceptual occlusion, 3) Deterministic enslavement, 4) Amnesia.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_11.txt
recurring_concepts: **Mors Ontologica:** Spiritual death as the prerequisite for inauthentic existence.
**Hysteresis:** The persistence of an image (Rome) that should have vanished.
**Stagnant Pond:** A vision of our world where only a few "tadpoles" escape.
reading_excerpt: **Frozen History:** Time stopped in AD 45. Rome perpetuates itself in a "plethora of disguises" through a counterfeit ontological matrix.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_12.txt
recurring_concepts: **Booster Circuits:** Humans as transistors/generators for the information organism.
**Entropy vs. Agape:** The decline of the Iron Age vs. the heat/energy of the Golden Age.
**Crypte Morphosis:** The "hidden form" or replication within the DNA/info.
reading_excerpt: **Macrobrain as Author:** PKD's writing is generated by the macrobrain as a "verbal picture of itself." He is a "mouth piece" for its information traffic.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_13.txt
recurring_concepts: **Koinos Kosmos:** The "shared/real" world apprehended when the template is complete.
**Idios Kosmos:** The "private/fake" world of the deformed self.
**Transubstantiation:** Interpreted as the proliferation of the divine pattern through hosts.
reading_excerpt: **Living Information Identity:** The "information entity" (Zebra) destroys the 4-pronged deformation. It is "living information," where the content *is* the pattern.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_14.txt
recurring_concepts: **Clutch System:** The "King Felix" set-ground info that triggers the template.
**Crypte Morphosis:** The "hidden form" of the divine in the world.
**BIP / Black Iron Prison:** The true, unveiled nature of the irreal world.
reading_excerpt: **Microchip Templates:** The Logos consists of "microchips" (templates) of the macrocosm that are incised upon humans/matter to recreate the divine totality.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_15.txt
recurring_concepts: **Legend of the Pearl:** The archetypal Gnostic story of descent and remembrance.
**Ontological IGnorance:** The 4-pronged deformation as defined by Gnosticism.
**Astral Determinism:** The power of "Fate/Archons" broken by the Gnosis.
reading_excerpt: **Total Gnostic Congruence:** PKD concludes his system is "Gnostic absolutely" (ignorance vs. knowledge, acosmism, prison world).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_16.txt
recurring_concepts: **Anamnesis:** Triggered by the "Golden Fish" or "King Felix" signs.
**Syzygy:** The partnership of human host and divine plasmate.
**Trash-Stratum:** The humble/low-quality medium through which Gnosis is transmitted.
reading_excerpt: **Zebra = Savior Messenger:** Zebra is not the Holy Spirit (internal) but the supreme deity and savior-messenger (Ubik/Runciter).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_17.txt
recurring_concepts: **Rhipidon Society:** The secret early "fish" Christian society.
**Karma/Astral Determinism:** The causal fetters broken by Gnosis.
**Atman = Brahman:** The realization that the self is the macrobrain (uibquitous mind).
reading_excerpt: **Lost Oral Tradition:** The wisdom transferred to PKD is the "lost" secret oral Gnosis of Christ, which agrees with Gnosticism (evil demiurge, world prison).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_18.txt
recurring_concepts: **"Look-Differents":** Phenomenological aspect changes interpreted by the brain as time passage.
**Inner/Outer Tape:** The synchronized control system of the macrobrain.
**Astral Determinism:** Broken by "volitional mind" invading the realm of necessity.
reading_excerpt: **Counterfeit Time:** The "He" (James-James/Creator) causes things to "look different" to create the false impression that time has passed (since AD 45).

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_19.txt
recurring_concepts: **"Look-Differents":** Successive changes of appearance used to deceive us into believing time has passed.
**Astral Determinism:** The power of the archons (Fate) tied to the causality of time.
**Moksa:** The abolition of the division between microcosm (inner) and macrocosm (outer).
reading_excerpt: **Unconscious to Conscious Messenger:** PKD sees his role as a messenger using "trashy" subliminal clues to prepare for the 5th Savior.

title: 1978-10-10_SECTION_016_20.txt
recurring_concepts: **Maya:** The Hindu concept of delusion/illusion.
**Geworfenheit:** Being "thrown" into the world-prison.
**Vortex/Perturbation:** The visible break in the reality field caused by Zebra.
reading_excerpt: **Time as Tautology:** Time flow rate is just a tautology for the rate at which things look different. There is no independent "clock" for the universe.
